step1.title: Check voter registration
step1.description: Verify your name on the electoral roll at voters.eci.gov.in

step2.title: Register if not enrolled
step2.description: Submit Form 6 on NVSP portal with supporting documents

step4.title: Find your polling booth
step4.description: Search your booth address and serial number on electoral roll

step5.title: Polling day — cast your vote
step5.description: Carry approved photo ID. Press button next to your chosen symbol on EVM. VVPAT confirms your vote.

step6.title: Track results
step6.description: Watch live results on results.eci.gov.in after polls close

step1.title: Check Maharashtra electoral roll
step1.description: Verify your name at ceo.maharashtra.gov.in or voters.eci.gov.in

step2.title: Register via Form 6
step2.description: Submit online at NVSP portal or offline at your Taluka office

step3.title: Download e-EPIC card
step3.description: Maharashtra voters can download digital EPIC from voterportal.eci.gov.in

step4.title: Find your polling booth
step4.description: Search your booth via CEO Maharashtra or NVSP portal

step5.title: Cast your vote on polling day
step5.description: Carry approved photo ID. Use EVM + VVPAT verification.

step6.title: Track Maharashtra results
step6.description: Live results on results.eci.gov.in and CEO Maharashtra portal
